## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align on Diligent's SEO strategy and content optimization goals with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Diligent aims to increase organic search traffic from 30% to 50%, focusing on qualified leads](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Key priorities: Refresh existing content, improve site architecture, and target SMB segment](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Challenges include content consolidation, consistent tone/voice, and internal linking strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Significant opportunity exists to optimize \~1.3M monthly searches across 887 resource pages](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)

## Topics

### Current Marketing Mix and Goals

  - [Current mix: 30% organic search, 35% direct, rest paid](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Goal: Increase organic search to 50% of qualified traffic](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [Shifting focus from enterprise to SMB segment for growth](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Need to build separate motions for enterprise/mid-market vs SMB](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)

### Content Strategy Challenges

  - [1,700+ pages of content managed across different teams](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Lack of consistent tone of voice and content architecture](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Need to consolidate approach and align SEO/content teams](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [Opportunity to improve internal linking and user funnels](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)

### Top Performing Content

  - [Highly optimized blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=2546.0)
  - [Gated assets like corporate secretary checklist, GC prep checklist](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=2556.0)
  - [Governance buyer's guide](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=2584.0)
  - [Content on corporate secretary role/responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=2601.0)

### Brand Perception and Positioning

  - [Perceived as premium, potentially expensive and complex](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)
  - [Reputation for expertise but can seem "stuffy" compared to competitors](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Aiming to humanize tone while maintaining professional image](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=2056.0)
  - [Highlighting ability to start small and scale with Diligent's solutions](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=3005.0)

### SEO Opportunity Analysis

  - [1.3M monthly US searches across 887 resource pages](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [Strong brand reputation beneficial for LLM citations](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=3326.0)
  - [Potential to aggressively target long-tail keywords](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=3338.0)

### Technical Implementation

  - [Using Sanity CMS with Okta SSO](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=3433.0)
  - [Recently implemented Optimizely for A/B testing](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)
  - [Undergoing website architecture and landing page redesign](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=2782.0)

## Next Steps

  - Schedule deep dive on customer segments and personas
  - [Set up CMS access and publishing walkthrough for GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=3390.0)
  - [GrowthX to analyze site sections beyond resources for optimization](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=3507.0)
  - [Map out content strategy aligned to personas and topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=3526.0)
  - [Develop plan to improve internal linking and conversion paths](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=3588.0)
  - [Define metrics and reporting cadence for leadership updates](https://fathom.video/share/xkwE-Fskutqd5XjjNfFbN6zAmaDyzNdN?tab=summary&timestamp=3649.0)
